tagline.en: A macOS screenshot tool — click, instant capture.
tagline.zh: macOS 截图工具。咔，一爆即得。

description.en: A lightweight, fast screenshot utility for macOS. Hit a hotkey, pick a window or region, then annotate it right on screen — arrows, shapes, text, mosaic — and copy or save. The first kernel of the baomi family.
description.zh: 轻量、快速的 macOS 截图工具。按下快捷键，框选窗口或区域，然后直接在屏幕上标注——箭头、图形、文字、马赛克——再复制或保存。苞米家族的第一粒。

en: Global hotkey to summon the capture layer; window, region, and full-screen modes
Annotate in place: arrow, line, rectangle, ellipse, pen, text, and mosaic
Drag to reposition the capture before you mark it up
Return to copy to the clipboard, or save as PNG via a panel
Hover highlighting locks onto the right window, even hotkey-raised ones
Custom hotkey, local auto-save, and launch-at-login
zh: 全局快捷键唤起截图层；窗口、区域、全屏三种模式
原地标注：箭头、直线、方框、圆圈、画笔、文字、马赛克
标注前可拖动截图到任意位置
回车复制到剪贴板，或弹面板保存为 PNG
悬停高亮精准锁定目标窗口（含快捷键唤起的窗口）
自定义快捷键、本地自动保存、开机自启
